name: @engineeringood/athena-ide
description: Athena Theia product workspace for M4.

scripts.clean: yarn --cwd ../integrations/graph-glsp clean && yarn workspace @engineeringood/athena-theia-frontend clean && yarn workspace @engineeringood/athena-theia-backend clean && yarn workspace @engineeringood/athena-theia-product clean
scripts.build: yarn --cwd ../integrations/graph-glsp build && yarn workspace @engineeringood/athena-theia-frontend build && yarn workspace @engineeringood/athena-theia-backend build && yarn workspace @engineeringood/athena-theia-product build && yarn prepare:dev-runtime
scripts.verify:m7: yarn --cwd ../integrations/graph-glsp test && yarn workspace @engineeringood/athena-theia-frontend test && yarn build && yarn start:smoke
scripts.verify:m8: yarn --cwd ../integrations/graph-glsp test && yarn workspace @engineeringood/athena-theia-frontend test && yarn build && yarn start:smoke
